mapper.select: SELECT eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, eval_year AS evalYear, eval_sequence AS evalSequence, end_date AS endDate, DATEDIFF(end_date, CURDATE()) AS daysRemaining, status FROM evaluation_period WHERE status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LIMIT 1
SELECT eval_period_id FROM evaluation_period WHERE status = 'IN_PROGRESS' LIMIT 1

SELECT qe.qualitative_evaluation_id AS evalId, qe.evaluatee_id AS evaluateeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, qe.status, CASE WHEN qe.status = 'SUBMITTED' THEN true ELSE false END AS submitted FROM qualitative_evaluation qe JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qe.evaluatee_id JOIN employee tl ON tl.employee_id = #{tlId} WHERE qe.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND qe.evaluation_level = 1 AND e.department_id = tl.department_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER' ORDER BY e.employee_name

SELECT qe2.qualitative_evaluation_id AS evalId, qe2.evaluatee_id AS evaluateeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, e.employee_tier AS employeeTier, qe1.score AS firstStageScore, NULL AS aiRecommendedScore, qe2.status FROM qualitative_evaluation qe2 JOIN qualitative_evaluation qe1 ON qe1.evaluatee_id = qe2.evaluatee_id AND qe1.evaluation_period_id = qe2.evaluation_period_id AND qe1.evaluation_level = 1 AND qe1.status = 'SUBMITTED' JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qe2.evaluatee_id JOIN employee dl ON dl.employee_id = #{dlId} WHERE qe2.evaluation_period_id = #{periodId} AND qe2.evaluation_level = 2 AND e.department_id = dl.department_id AND e.employee_role = 'WORKER' ORDER BY e.employee_name
